title: Good Boy - Mega Chewy Chicken With Carrot Stick -Case of 14, 100 g (Pack of 1)
features: STOCK UP ON DOGGY FAVS: never be without your pup's favourite treat, with our bulk box - contains 14 packs of 100g Good Boy Mega Chicken with Carrot Stick Dog Treats
NATURALLY MEATY: made with 100% natural chicken breast meat, for that meaty treaty taste
NO RAWHIDE: with scrummy carrot, for a chewy treat without rawhide
FOR SENSITIVE TUMMIES: made without artificial colours, flavours or preservatives to be gentler on tums
CHEWY TEXTURE: dogs love to chew and it’s a great way to support healthy teeth, strong jaws and keep boredom at bay
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to our world! At Good Boy it's all about your dog - as the UK's #1 Dog Treat Brand , making sure you and your furry pals are happy is at the top of our priority list, starting with the tastiest treats, hearty dog's dinners and the coolest toys and accessories. Making dogs' tails waggle is second nature at Good Boy: our motto is: "if your dog is healthy and happy, so are we!". Real Meat Rawhide-Free Twists These super scrummy, chewy real meat rawhide free twists are a real hit! With the chewy middle wrapped in yummy real meat - they are sure to go down a treat. Our wag-nificent treat is available in a range of tasty flavours and sizes for every size of dog. Find your perfect treat here: Good Boy - Cheesy Chicken Sticks - Dog Treats - Made With 100% Natural Chicke... Good Boy - Chewy Chicken With Carrot Sticks - Dog Treats - Made With 100% Nat... Good Boy - Chewy Chicken With Sweet Potato Sticks - Dog Treats - Made With 10... Good Boy - Chewy Duck With Carrot Sticks - Dog Treats - Made With 100% Natura... Good Boy Chicken & Rice Sticks - Low Fat Natural Dog Treats - Rawhide Free Re... Good Boy - Mega Chewy Chicken With Carrot Stick -Case of 14, 100 g (Pack of 1) Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 4.7 out of 5 stars 7,734 4.7 out of 5 stars 296 4.6 out of 5 stars 314 Flavour Chicken & Cheese Chicken & Carrot Chicken & Sweet Potato Duck & Carrot Chicken & Rice Chicken & Carrot Paw-some Dog Treats We know just how important it is to feed your dog the right treats for their size, age and breed. We also know how important treats are for making your dog super happy. So here at Good Boy we have a huge range of dog treats in all different shapes, flavours and sizes to suit every occasion of treating your dog. Scrummy Meals Complete hearty meals, lovingly made in the UK with no nasties (no added sugar, no fillers, no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives). With tasty real meat and vegetables - our Home Faves recipes are vet approved for goodness, and dog approved for scrumminess! Wag-nificent Toys Any doggo will tell you - playtime is the best time. Our dog toys are designed so they can play their way! However your pup loves to play - whether you have a fetch fiend, or a softy snuggler - Good Boy has the perfect toy for them. Fur-tastic Health & Hygiene Good Boy is all about goodness - with our health and hygiene range, you can take care of your dog from nose to tail (and everything in between!). From enriching their mealtimes with scrummy salmon oil, to pampering their paws with our 100% organic nose and paw balm - perfect for the pampered pooch in your life.
